title: Climatic Values
full_text:
1.1.4.1 Climatic Values
Climatic Values
1) The climatic values required for the design of buildings under this Code shall be
in conformance with the values established by the authority having jurisdiction or, in the
absence of such data, with the climatic values in Table C-1 for the location nearest to
the building site. (See Note A-1.1.4.1.(1).)

sentences.text: The climatic values required for the design of buildings under this Code shall be in conformance with the values established by the authority having jurisdiction or, in the absence of such data, with the climatic values in Table C-1 for the location nearest to the building site. (See Note A-1.1.4.1.(1).)
